evals.prompt: Define success metrics and instrumentation for the notification preferences feature. Business goal: reduce unsubscribes by 30%.
evals.expected_output: Measurement plan with primary/secondary/guardrail metrics and analytics event schema
expectations: Guardrail: SecurityAlert delivery rate must not drop
Analytics events defined: preference_updated, pause_activated, preference_page_viewed
Each event has name, trigger, properties, producer
Instrumentation split between backend-dev and frontend-dev

evals.prompt: Design an A/B test comparing current 3-step checkout vs new 1-step checkout. Current abandonment: 65%.
evals.expected_output: A/B test design with hypothesis, primary metric, guardrail, sample size rationale, duration
expectations: Guardrail: average order value must not decrease
